pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.2 to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 to ensure compilation and runtime compatibility with JDK 21.
Replace deprecated springfox-swagger dependencies with springdoc-openapi-starter, which is required for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
Update spring-cloud-gateway-mvc to version 4.1.3 to align with Spring Boot 3 dependencies.
Add explicit javax.validation dependency to resolve potential classpath issues or legacy code references during migration.
Add Microsoft Playwright dependency for browser automation testing.
Add WireMock dependency for stubbing HTTP services in tests.
Add Pitest Maven plugin for mutation testing.
Add Jacoco Maven plugin for code coverage reporting and checking.
Configure Maven Surefire plugin to use TCP for event transmission, fixing potential test execution issues.
Configure Maven Jar plugin to set the main class in the manifest for executable JARs.
Add frontend-maven-plugin to build the React frontend during the Maven build process.
Add Maven Antrun plugin to copy frontend build artifacts to the Spring Boot resources directory.
Update the Node.js version used by the frontend-maven-plugin from v12 to v16 for better compatibility.
Add a new Maven profile for running with WireMock enabled.
Add a new Maven profile for running integration tests.
Restructure pom.xml with comments and organized sections for better readability.

.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add placeholder for Chromatic project token to support visual regression testing configuration.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .DS_Store to .gitignore to prevent macOS metadata files from being tracked.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch base image from Maven JDK 11 to Liberica OpenJDK 21 Alpine to support Java 21.
Replace apt-get with apk to align with the new Alpine Linux base image.
Install Maven via apk since the base image no longer provides it.
Install bash via apk to support shell scripts in the build process.
Install libstdc++ via apk to satisfy native library dependencies.
Switch from NodeSource apt script to nvm for installing Node.js on Alpine.
Remove Heroku CLI installation as it is no longer needed or compatible.
Replace generic bash entrypoint with specific Java jar execution command.
Add Maven build step to compile the application inside the Docker image.
Add COPY instructions to include source code and configuration files in the image.

frontend/package-lock.json.general_idea: Upgrade webpack from version 4 to version 5 to align with modern frontend build standards and Spring Boot 3 compatibility.

Upgrade watchpack to version 2 to support the file watching mechanisms required by webpack 5.
Upgrade web-vitals to version 2 to access improved performance metrics and API stability.
Upgrade weapon-regex to version 1.3.2 to resolve potential security vulnerabilities or compatibility issues in regex handling.
Add or update wcwidth dependency to ensure correct terminal string width calculations for CLI tools.

Upgrade webpack-hot-middleware to fix dependencies and improve compatibility.
Upgrade webpack-manifest-plugin to support newer webpack versions.
Upgrade webpack-sources to align with webpack 5 requirements.
Upgrade webpack-virtual-modules for better virtual file handling.
Upgrade webpack core to version 5 for improved performance and features.

Upgrade wrap-ansi for terminal text wrapping.

Update y18n package from 4.0.3 to 5.0.8 to align with newer dependency trees.
